Question 1 of 5
Happy Birthday, Zoya 🎂
Dil se, Aapki yaar ki taraf se 💛
🌿
Sehat
Aapki sehat hamesha achi rahe — andar se aur bahar se bhi. Khush rahein, tanaav se door rahein. Aap jab healthy hain toh duniya khoobsurat lagti hai.
🚀
Aasman chhuein
Aap bahut aage jayengi — dil se yaqeen hai yeh. Jo bhi sapne hain aapke, unhe poora karne ki taqat aap mein hai. Bas rukna mat kabhi.
✨
Khushiyan
Aapki zindagi mein sirf khushiyan aayein — chhoti chhoti bhi, badi bhi. Har din kuch aisa ho jo aapko muskuraane par majboor kare.
You, today ❤️
Aaj aap ki raat hai — poori tarah aapki
🎂   Happy Birthday
Zoya
Yeh raat sirf aapki hai ✨
